title: Venue
doc_html:
Art. 352.  Venue

Habeas corpus proceedings by or on behalf of a person in custody shall be instituted in the parish in which the person is in custody.

Amended by Acts 1980, No. 429, §2, eff. Jan. 1, 1981.
